releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
* 新增手动解决冲突功能，支持对比编辑并合并冲突的笔记。
* Added manual conflict resolution function to support comparing, editing and merging conflicting notes.
* 同步日志中对于存在冲突的笔记提供“解决冲突”的快捷操作入口。
* For conflicting notes in the synchronization log, a quick operation entry for "resolving conflicts" is provided.
* 云预览设置中新增“动态附件目录”开关，开启后请求云端预览文件会自动拼接默认附件存放目录。
* A new "Dynamic Attachment Directory" switch has been added to the cloud preview settings. When turned on, requesting a cloud preview file will automatically splice the default attachment storage directory.
* 云预览远端源映射配置新增 `{notePath}`（当前笔记路径）和 `{attachmentFolderPath}`（默认附件目录）变量支持。
* Cloud preview remote source mapping configuration adds `{notePath}` (current note path) and `{attachmentFolderPath}` (default attachment directory) variable support.

### ⚡️ 优化与改进
### ⚡️ Optimization and improvement
* 优化远端笔记库名修改流程，改为点击后弹窗确认修改，避免误触直接清空本地同步时间缓存。
* Optimize the process of modifying the name of the remote note library, and change it to a pop-up window after clicking to confirm the modification, to avoid accidentally clearing the local synchronization time cache directly.

### 💄 其他/体验
### 💄 Other/Experience
* 调整“远端服务地址”与“远端授权令牌”输入框为垂直布局，优化长文本展示。
* Adjust the "Remote Service Address" and "Remote Authorization Token" input boxes to a vertical layout to optimize the display of long text.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
* 新增分享有效期设置选项，并增加分享管理控制台。
* Added sharing validity period setting options and added sharing management console.
* 新增同步失败项视图，支持“仅看失败”筛选、错误原因展示、失败项淘汰上限及状态栏红点提示。
* Added a new synchronization failed item view, which supports "see only failures" filtering, error cause display, failed item elimination limit, and status bar red dot prompt.
* 新增离线超墓碑期保护机制，防止设备长期离线后，误将服务端已清理的失效文件作为新增文件重新上传。
* Added an offline over-tombstone protection mechanism to prevent the device from mistakenly re-uploading invalid files that have been cleaned by the server as new files after the device has been offline for a long time.
* 新增写盘前校验，在服务端推送落盘前检查本地是否存在未同步的编辑，避免覆盖本地改动。
* Added verification before writing to the disk. Check whether there are unsynchronized local edits before pushing to the disk on the server side to avoid overwriting local changes.

### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
* 修复移动端（iOS/Android）同步配置（API、Token、Vault）使用一段时间后丢失的 Bug。
* Fixed the bug that the synchronization configuration (API, Token, Vault) of the mobile terminal (iOS/Android) is lost after a period of use.
* 修复离线超墓碑期保护在点击取消后仅单轮生效的 Bug。
* Fixed the bug that the offline over-tombstone period protection only takes effect in one round after clicking Cancel.
* 修复附件上传与重命名并发冲突导致的竞态问题。
* Fixed a race condition problem caused by concurrent conflicts between attachment uploading and renaming.
* 修复断线重连时，因旧同步会话网络响应迟到异常清空新会话状态的 Bug。
* Fixed the bug that caused the new session status to be cleared abnormally due to late network response of the old synchronization session when disconnected and reconnected.
* 修复大文件跳过通知在移动端重复弹出的 Bug。
* Fixed a bug that caused large file skip notifications to pop up repeatedly on the mobile side.
* 修复移动端每次启动时全量重新计算哈希的问题。
* Fixed the issue of fully recalculating the hash every time the mobile terminal is started.
* 修复分页进度乱序或重复导致同步卡死的问题，超时保底分支不再对未完成下载静默报成功。
* Fixed the problem of synchronization being stuck due to out-of-order or repeated paging progress. The timeout guarantee branch no longer silently reports success for unfinished downloads.
* 修复并发限制器清理时可能导致队列任务永久悬挂死锁的 Bug。
* Fixed a bug that may cause queue tasks to hang permanently in deadlock when concurrency limiter is cleared.
* 修复配置增量扫描时可能丢失本地未推送改动的 Bug。
* Fixed a bug where local unpushed changes may be lost when configuring incremental scanning.
* 修复写盘失败时未正确计数，导致同步完成通知中将失败项误统计为成功的 Bug。
* Fixed a bug that caused incorrect counting of disk writing failures, causing the failed items to be mistakenly counted as successful in the synchronization completion notification.
* 修复插件卸载后未清理定时器与同步任务导致的残留/内存泄漏问题。
* Fixed the residual/memory leak problem caused by not clearing timers and synchronization tasks after plug-in uninstallation.
* 修复同步日志中不显示上传消息的 Bug。
* Fixed a bug where upload messages are not displayed in the synchronization log.

### ⚡️ 优化与改进
### ⚡️ Optimization and improvement
* 优化文件下载流程，支持流式写入，消除大文件下载时的双份内存峰值。
* Optimize the file download process, support streaming writing, and eliminate the double memory peak when downloading large files.
* 优化大文件哈希计算，改用头/中/尾三段采样，避免哈希计算卡顿。
* Optimize the hash calculation of large files and use three-segment sampling of head/middle/tail to avoid hash calculation lag.
* 优化冷建哈希映射与缓存未命中扫描，改用最多 6 路有限并发读取和哈希计算。
* Optimize cold-built hash mapping and cache miss scanning, using up to 6-way limited concurrent reads and hash calculations instead.
* 优化扫描循环，使用 yieldToMain (MessageChannel) 替代 sleep(0) 规避 Chromium 4ms 延迟。
* Optimize the scan loop and use yieldToMain (MessageChannel) instead of sleep(0) to avoid Chromium's 4ms delay.
* 优化路径哈希与快照删除，改用防抖保存而非同步整表写盘。
* Optimize path hashing and snapshot deletion, use anti-shake saving instead of synchronizing the entire table writing to disk.
* 优化哈希/快照缓存写入，改用脏​​标记 + 防抖落盘，避免高频写入 LocalStorage 导致白屏。
* Optimize hash/snapshot cache writing, use dirty mark + anti-shake disk to avoid white screen caused by high-frequency writing to LocalStorage.
* 优化数据传输协议，引入上行分批发送的滑动窗口状态机，支持下行分页按索引归账与 ACK 水位线推进。
* Optimize the data transmission protocol, introduce a sliding window state machine for upstream batch transmission, and support downstream paging based on index accounting and ACK water level advancement.
* 移除文件夹同步的 30 秒等待限制，支持四类清单并发发出，大幅缩减同步前准备时间。
* Remove the 30-second waiting limit for folder synchronization and support concurrent issuance of four types of lists, greatly reducing the preparation time before synchronization.
* 默认开启并发限流控制。
* Concurrent current limiting control is enabled by default.
* 减少大库同步时的日志磁盘写入，跳过高频接收消息的成功日志持久化，降低 I/O 开销。
* Reduce log disk writing during large database synchronization, skip successful log persistence of high-frequency received messages, and reduce I/O overhead.
* 优化启动延迟逻辑，确保首次启动延迟只在加载后首次连接生效，重连不再重复延迟。
* Optimize the startup delay logic to ensure that the first startup delay only takes effect on the first connection after loading, and reconnection will not repeat the delay.
* 优化同步日志性能，采用 Map 结构消除高频更新时的 O(n²) 查找开销，并为状态栏和日志更新加入节流控制。
* Optimize synchronization log performance, use Map structure to eliminate O(n²) search overhead during high-frequency updates, and add throttling control for status bar and log updates.
* 优化目录删除同步逻辑，超时后放弃强删，避免误删未下载完或新建的文件。
* Optimize directory deletion synchronization logic and give up forced deletion after timeout to avoid accidentally deleting undownloaded or newly created files.

### 💄 其他/体验
### 💄 Other/Experience
* 调整同步日志界面布局。
* Adjust the synchronization log interface layout.
* 暂时下线文件差异可视化功能，等待后续改进。
* The file difference visualization function is temporarily offline, waiting for subsequent improvements.
* 调整并发控制默认开启的相关国际化文案。
* Adjust the relevant internationalization text that concurrency control is turned on by default.
* 修正未连接状态下发送消息的日志文案，准确提示为直接丢弃。
* Corrected the log copy of messages sent when not connected, and the correct prompt is to discard them directly.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## ⚠️ 重要提示
## ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTICE
* 不兼容警告：本次更新涉及核心同步协议重构，服务端必须升级至 3.5.0 或以上版本，否则将无法正常使用同步功能。
* Incompatibility warning: This update involves the reconstruction of the core synchronization protocol. The server must be upgraded to version 3.5.0 or above, otherwise the synchronization function will not be able to be used normally.
## 🔄 核心更新
## 🔄 Core update
* 重构同步协议,增加上传下载消息分批传输,服务端下载速度控制，解决同步过程中的卡顿，以及大笔记库无法正常同步的问题。
* Reconstruct the synchronization protocol, add batch transmission of upload and download messages, and server-side download speed control to solve the problem of lagging during the synchronization process and the problem that large note libraries cannot be synchronized normally.
### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
- 重构状态栏同步进度条功能, 并且在移动端同步日志面板底部增加同步进度展示。
- Reconstruct the status bar synchronization progress bar function, and add synchronization progress display at the bottom of the mobile terminal synchronization log panel.
- 后台增设哈希计算数量限制配置开关,默认不限制。
- Added a configuration switch to limit the number of hash calculations in the background. There is no limit by default.
### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
- 修复高频写入本地 `localStorage` 导致界面白屏的问题。
- Fixed the issue of high-frequency writing to local `localStorage` causing a white screen in the interface.
- 修复目录消息同步可能出现串发等待的问题。
- Fixed the problem that directory message synchronization may cause serial transmission waiting.
- 修复状态栏并发控制图标显示异常。
- Fixed the abnormal display of the concurrency control icon in the status bar.

### ⚡️ 优化与改进
### ⚡️ Optimization and improvement
- 彻底移除了废弃的自动监听机制（`isWatchEnabled`）。
- Completely removed the deprecated automatic monitoring mechanism (`isWatchEnabled`).
- 合并了“清理同步时间”和“清理哈希”的操作入口。
- Merged the operation entries of "Clean synchronization time" and "Clean hash".
- 优化状态栏同步完成提示的显示时长并增加图标。
- Optimize the display duration of the synchronization completion prompt in the status bar and add an icon.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
- 修复了本地存储（localStorage）变更监听器未正确清理导致的内存泄露问题。
- Fixed a memory leak issue caused by the localStorage change listener not being cleaned up correctly.
- 修复了文件夹分享状态图标因 CSS 选择器范围过大而错误显示在子文件夹或同级文件夹的问题。
- Fixed an issue where the folder sharing status icon was incorrectly displayed in subfolders or sibling folders due to the CSS selector range being too large.
### ⚡️ 优化与改进
### ⚡️ Optimization and improvement
- 优化了断开连接重连时的多国语言提示文本，使文案描述更加通俗易懂。
- Optimized the multi-language prompt text when disconnecting and reconnecting, making the copy description more understandable.
- 手动点击断开连接状态的同步按钮可立即触发重新连接，并在连通后自动执行待处理的同步任务。
- Manually clicking the sync button in the disconnected state can immediately trigger reconnection and automatically execute pending synchronization tasks after connection.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
- 新增“笔记同步最大限制”与“附件同步最大限制”设置，支持在控制面板中自定义可同步的文件大小上限。
- Added "Maximum Note Synchronization Limit" and "Maximum Attachment Synchronization Limit" settings to support customizing the maximum file size that can be synchronized in the control panel.
### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
- 修复了超大笔记本仓库（30,000+ 文件）在全量同步时由于堆内存溢出或 WebSocket 数据包过大导致卡死在 99% 的问题。
- Fixed an issue where a very large notebook warehouse (30,000+ files) would get stuck at 99% due to heap memory overflow or excessively large WebSocket packets during full synchronization.
### ⚡️ 优化与改进
### ⚡️ Optimization and improvement
- 优化了超大文件的哈希处理逻辑，增加了 15 秒超时竞速判定，防止异常损坏的文件使同步流程无限挂起。
- Optimized the hash processing logic of very large files, and added a 15-second timeout racing decision to prevent abnormally damaged files from causing the synchronization process to hang indefinitely.
- 引入了哈希缓存扫描时批量落盘机制，使未完成同步时的已哈希数据能够即时保存，避免重启后重复全量扫描。
- Introduced a batch download mechanism during hash cache scanning, so that hashed data can be saved immediately when synchronization is not completed, avoiding repeated full scans after restarting.
- 限制单次 WebSocket 同步消息数组的最大长度为 2000 项，防止载荷超标引发网络静默断开。
- Limit the maximum length of a single WebSocket synchronization message array to 2000 items to prevent silent network disconnection caused by excessive load.
- 将扫描进度日志的更新频率由每 20 个文件一次降为每 100 个文件一次，降低主线程 DOM 绘制开销。
- Reduce the update frequency of the scan progress log from once every 20 files to once every 100 files to reduce the main thread DOM drawing overhead.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 🛠 修复与改进
### 🛠 Fixes and improvements
* 修复了探测自动重定向可能导致 Token 泄露给第三方不安全域名的风险，限制仅在允许的域名列表内重定向。
* Fixed the risk that detecting automatic redirection may cause Tokens to be leaked to third-party unsafe domain names, and restrict redirection to only the allowed domain name list.
* 修复了测试远端健康状态接口时携带敏感身份凭证（Authorization 标头）的安全隐患。
* Fixed the security risk of carrying sensitive identity credentials (Authorization header) when testing the remote health status interface.
* 修复了本地 LocalStorage 明文存储敏感令牌（Token）的问题，安全升级为基于本地 Vault 标识的混淆加密存储。
* Fixed the problem of local LocalStorage plain text storage of sensitive tokens (Token), and safely upgraded to obfuscated encrypted storage based on the local Vault identity.
* 修复了更新包解压提取时可能遭遇的 Zip Slip 目录穿越安全漏洞，增加了文件写入的路径防跨越校验。
* Fixed the Zip Slip directory traversal security vulnerability that may be encountered when decompressing and extracting the update package, and added anti-crossing verification of the file writing path.
* 修复了版本升级解析可能遭遇的 Tag 劫持风险，限制版本号解析仅接受标准语义化 SemVer 格式。
* Fixed the risk of Tag hijacking that may be encountered in version upgrade parsing, limiting version number parsing to only accept the standard semantic SemVer format.
* 移除了冗余且未被使用的二进制文件下载接口。
* Removed redundant and unused binary file download interface.
* 针对官方商店优化代码结构
* Optimize the code structure for the official store

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
- 支持 protobuf 协议，提升网络同步的连接效率与稳定性。

- Fixed an issue where changes to the note library were missed during the synchronization process.
### ⚡️ 优化与改进
### ⚡️ Optimization and improvement
- 重构了内部代码结构，理顺了各功能模块的存放位置。
- Reconstructed the internal code structure and straightened out the storage locations of each functional module.
- 优化了同步流程的配置及状态管理机制。
- Optimized the configuration and status management mechanism of the synchronization process.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ⚡️ 优化与性能
### ⚡️ Optimization and performance
* 新增“同步状态指示器”控制开关，支持按需开启或关闭同步时的旋转图标，默认关闭状态，减少日常编辑时的视觉干扰。
* A new "Sync Status Indicator" control switch is added to support turning on or off the rotating icon during synchronization as needed. It is turned off by default to reduce visual interference during daily editing.
### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
* 修复调试日志可能泄露敏感信息的问题，引入兜底递归敏感数据扫描机制，自动脱敏密码、API Token 等隐私信息。
* Fix the problem that debugging logs may leak sensitive information, introduce a recursive sensitive data scanning mechanism, and automatically desensitize private information such as passwords and API Tokens.
* 修复 WebSocket 重连或断开时并发槽位未清理，导致同步旋转图标卡死无法关闭的问题。
* Fixed the issue where the concurrent slot was not cleared when WebSocket was reconnected or disconnected, resulting in the synchronized rotating icon being stuck and unable to be closed.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
- 增加版本安装：在插件设置的调试页面新增任意版本插件安装功能，允许您安装指定版本的Fast Note Sync插件。
- Added version installation: Add any version of the plug-in installation function on the debugging page of the plug-in settings, allowing you to install the specified version of the Fast Note Sync plug-in.
### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
- 解决关闭同步之后状态栏错误显示进度条的问题
- Solve the problem of the status bar incorrectly displaying the progress bar after closing synchronization
- 修复远端服务首次连接失败的问题。这主要是由于服务端与客户端之间网络请求耗时较长，导致连接探测超时而被重置。
- Fixed the issue where the remote service failed to connect for the first time. This is mainly because the network request between the server and the client takes a long time, causing the connection detection to time out and be reset.
- 修复同步完成后还继续提示尚未完成同步的问题
-Fixed the problem of continuing to prompt that the synchronization is not completed after the synchronization is completed.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
- 同步数据传输时，侧边栏和顶部的同步按钮会显示旋转图标，方便直观判断同步是否在进行中
- When synchronizing data transfer, the sidebar and the sync button at the top will display rotating icons to facilitate visual judgment of whether synchronization is in progress.
### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
- 修复冷启动（首次打开或网络不稳定时）健康检查失败后，同步连接被错误拦截无法自动恢复的问题
- Fixed the issue where the synchronization connection was incorrectly intercepted and could not be automatically restored after the health check failed during cold start (first startup or when the network is unstable)
- 修复重连退避策略过于激进的问题，前 3 次重连间隔固定为 1 秒，之后再指数增长，改善移动端（Capacitor）启动时的连接成功率
- Fixed the problem of too aggressive reconnection backoff strategy. The first three reconnection intervals are fixed at 1 second, and then increase exponentially to improve the connection success rate when the mobile terminal (Capacitor) starts.
- 修复部分安卓手机点击「复制 Debug 信息」无响应的问题
- Fixed the issue of unresponsiveness on some Android phones when clicking "Copy Debug Information"
- 修复部分安卓设备获取平台架构信息时 `arch` 字段丢失的问题
- Fixed the issue where the `arch` field is lost when some Android devices obtain platform architecture information
- 复制 Debug 信息后增加成功/失败的提示，不再无反馈
- Added success/failure prompts after copying Debug information, no longer no feedback
### ⚡️ 优化与性能
### ⚡️ Optimization and performance
- **文件下载流程重构**：将分片存储、内存管理、错误处理等逻辑拆分为独立函数，统一清理和失败路径，消除重复代码
- **File download process reconstruction**: Split logic such as sharded storage, memory management, and error handling into independent functions, unify cleaning and failure paths, and eliminate duplicate codes
- 移动端小文件下载自动使用内存模式，跳过磁盘临时文件，减少 I/O 开销
- Small file downloads on the mobile terminal automatically use memory mode, skipping temporary disk files and reducing I/O overhead.
- 磁盘写入失败时自动降级为内存模式（在文件大小允许范围内），避免下载直接中断
- Automatically downgrade to memory mode (within the allowed file size) when disk writing fails to avoid direct interruption of downloads
- 下载过程中增加分片索引校验和重复分片检测，防止无效数据导致文件损坏
- Add fragmentation index verification and duplicate fragmentation detection during the download process to prevent file damage caused by invalid data
- WebSocket 连接显式设置 `binaryType = "arraybuffer"`，避免浏览器默认 Blob 解析带来的额外内存拷贝
- WebSocket connection explicitly sets `binaryType = "arraybuffer"` to avoid additional memory copies caused by the browser's default Blob parsing

### ✨ 新功能
### ✨ NEW FEATURES
* **文件系统大小写冲突检测**：在笔记、目录、附件和配置同步中，自动检测并拦截由于操作系统不区分大小写导致的文件冲突，提示用户手动解决。
* **File system case conflict detection**: In notes, directories, attachments and configuration synchronization, automatically detect and intercept file conflicts caused by the operating system being insensitive to case, and prompt the user to resolve them manually.
### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
* **React 组件内存泄漏**：在设置页、支持名单及在线客户端等面板中引入生命周期挂载状态校验，防止组件销毁后继续执行状态更新引起的报错与内存泄漏。
* **React component memory leak**: Introduce life cycle mounting status verification in the settings page, support list, and online client panels to prevent errors and memory leaks caused by continuing to execute status updates after the component is destroyed.
* **版本更新红点提示异常**：修复菜单管理器在多次渲染时重复创建更新图标和红点 DOM 的问题，并优化了红点及提示图标的缩放布局。
* **Version update red dot prompt exception**: Fixed the problem of the menu manager repeatedly creating update icons and red dot DOM during multiple renderings, and optimized the scaling layout of red dots and prompt icons.
* **支持名单留言显示问题**：修复支持名单留言显示过于突出的问题，现在可以正常显示支持者的留言内容。
* **Support list message display issue**: Fixed the issue where support list messages are displayed too prominently, and supporter message content can now be displayed normally.
### ⚡️ 优化与性能
### ⚡️ Optimization and performance
* **统一异常捕获与日志高亮**：将各功能模块的分散错误日志接入 `dumpError` 统一收集，并在调试日志模态框中对包含 `[ERROR]` 的日志进行红色高亮标记。
* **Unified exception capture and log highlighting**: Connect the scattered error logs of each functional module to `dumpError` for unified collection, and highlight the logs containing `[ERROR]` in red in the debug log modal box.

### 🛠 修复
### 🛠 Fix
* 修复手机端从后台返回前台时重连极其缓慢的问题（通过限制后台无效重试，并在返回前台或界面可见时立即触发重连）。
* Fixed the problem of extremely slow reconnection when the mobile phone returns to the foreground from the background (by limiting invalid retries in the background and triggering reconnection immediately when returning to the foreground or the interface is visible).
### ⚡️ 优化与性能
### ⚡️ Optimization and performance
* 自动将插件自身的 `data.json` 配置文件加入内置排除列表，防止多端同步时覆盖敏感信息或引起配置冲突。
* Automatically add the plug-in's own `data.json` configuration file to the built-in exclusion list to prevent overwriting sensitive information or causing configuration conflicts during multi-end synchronization.
* 缩短断线重连的基础等待时间（从 3 秒降至 1 秒），大幅减少网络恢复后的初始等待时长。
* Shorten the basic waiting time for disconnection and reconnection (from 3 seconds to 1 second), significantly reducing the initial waiting time after network recovery.
* 优化移动端健康检查判定机制，将超时判定缩短至 1 秒并在失败后立即重试一次，使恢复同步的耗时从 12.2 秒大幅缩短至 2.1 秒。
* Optimize the health check judgment mechanism of the mobile terminal, shorten the timeout judgment to 1 second and retry immediately after failure, greatly shortening the time to resume synchronization from 12.2 seconds to 2.1 seconds.

### 🛠 Fix
- 修复移动端处理大文件时，因 Buffer 越界导致的扫描挂起异常。
- Fixed a scanning hang exception caused by Buffer out-of-bounds when processing large files on the mobile terminal.
- 修复配置文件同步时的哈希重复计算问题，提升同步效率 (需服务端 v3+)。
- Fixed the hash duplication calculation problem during configuration file synchronization and improved synchronization efficiency (requires server v3+).
- 修复多库并发场景下的消息交叉干扰问题，确保通知隔离 (需服务端 v3+)。

- 优化同步请求握手流程，采用“文件夹优先”策略，避免并发创建冲突。

- 新增大文件哈希计算失败时的降级兜底方案，确保异常情况下同步流程不中断。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
⚠️ 注意事项：升级前，需要先将服务端版本升级到 v2.13.4, 否则移动端将无法连接到服务端。
⚠️ Note: Before upgrading, you need to upgrade the server version to v2.13.4, otherwise the mobile terminal will not be able to connect to the server.
#### ✨ **新功能 (New Features)**
#### ✨ **New Features**
- 新增在线客户端，通过菜单内打开，可以查看当前在线的客户端。
- Added a new online client, which can be opened through the menu to view the currently online clients.
- 引入 WebSocket 连接前置健康检查 (`/api/health`)，确保服务端就绪后再初始化长连接。
- Introduced WebSocket connection pre-health check (`/api/health`) to ensure that the server is ready before initializing a long connection.
#### 🛠 **修复 (Bug Fixes)**
#### 🛠 **Bug Fixes**
- 修正 `config_operator` 内部插件 ID 匹配逻辑，解决 `fast-note-sync` 无法正确识别自身更新的问题。
- Fixed the `config_operator` internal plug-in ID matching logic to solve the problem of `fast-note-sync` not being able to correctly identify its own updates.
- 修复插件热重载与配置写入之间的竞态，强制等待 Config Sync 任务栈清空后执行 Disable/Enable。
- Fixed the race condition between plug-in hot reloading and configuration writing, forcing you to wait for the Config Sync task stack to be cleared before executing Disable/Enable.
- 修复远程调试地址 Fallback 机制失效的问题，保证健康检查异常时能正确降级。
- Fixed the problem of remote debugging address Fallback mechanism failure to ensure correct downgrade when health check exception occurs.
- 修复自定义配置目录的文件变动事件监听失败问题，确保非标目录的跨设备同步一致性。
- Fixed the problem of file change event monitoring failure in custom configuration directories to ensure the consistency of cross-device synchronization of non-standard directories.
- 修复开启 `cloudPreviewAutoDeleteLocal` 后云端预览 URL 报 404 的 Bug，废弃 `getAvailablePathForAttachment`，改用原始 `filePath` 进行精准解析。
- Fixed the bug that the cloud preview URL reported 404 after turning on `cloudPreviewAutoDeleteLocal`, abandoned `getAvailablePathForAttachment`, and used the original `filePath` for accurate parsing.
#### ⚡️ **优化与性能 (Optimizations)**
#### ⚡️ **Optimizations**
- 重构 `handleSync` 与 `FileHashManager` 生命周期，引入低内存模式与批量读取策略，解决高负载同步场景下的 OOM 崩溃问题。
- Reconstruct the `handleSync` and `FileHashManager` life cycles, introduce low memory mode and batch read strategy, and solve the OOM crash problem in high-load synchronization scenarios.

## What's Changed
* fix(cloud-preview): use link path instead of getAvailablePathForAttachment by @Friday218 in https://github.com/haierkeys/obsidian-fast-note-sync/pull/140

## New Contributors
* @Friday218 made their first contribution in https://github.com/haierkeys/obsidian-fast-note-sync/pull/140

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/haierkeys/obsidian-fast-note-sync/compare/1.24.6-alpha...1.25.1-alpha

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能 (New Features)
### ✨ New Features
- **并发上传控制**：引入并发上传控制机制，支持自定义最大并发上传数（默认 20），有效降低高负载同步时的网络拥塞 ( 需要服务端2.13+以上版本 )。
- **Concurrent upload control**: Introduces a concurrent upload control mechanism, supports customizing the maximum number of concurrent uploads (default 20), and effectively reduces network congestion during high-load synchronization (requires server version 2.13+ or above).
- **并发上传指示器**：状态栏新增并发上传限制实时反馈图标，支持在设置中自定义是否显示。
- **Concurrent upload indicator**: A new concurrent upload limit real-time feedback icon is added to the status bar. It supports customizing whether to display it in the settings.
### 🛠 修复 (Bug Fixes)
### 🛠 Bug Fixes
- **配置冗余持久化**：修复因排除规则迁移逻辑中的引用对比失效，导致插件启动或同步时频繁修改 `data.json` 的问题。
- **Configuring redundant persistence**: Fixed the issue where `data.json` was frequently modified during plug-in startup or synchronization due to invalid reference comparison in the migration logic of exclusion rules.
- **分页图标异常**：修复同步日志面板分页跳转逻辑错误，并纠正了导航图标在特定主题下的渲染异常。
- **Paging icon exception**: Fixed the paging jump logic error in the synchronized log panel, and corrected the rendering exception of the navigation icon under specific themes.
- **自定义配置目录失效**：修复自定义配置目录不同步的问题。
- **Custom configuration directory invalid**: Fixed the problem of custom configuration directory being out of sync.
### ⚡️ 优化与性能 (Optimizations)
### ⚡️Optimizations
- **日志筛选界面优化**：针对手机和平板端优化日志筛选界面，使其更加易用。
- **Log filtering interface optimization**: Optimize the log filtering interface for mobile phones and tablets to make it easier to use.
- **交互体验升级**：优化手机和平板端设置面板布局，改进交互体验。
- **Interactive experience upgrade**: Optimize the layout of the settings panel on mobile phones and tablets to improve the interactive experience.
- **版本概况调整**：优化查看版本概况显示尺寸和内部格式。
- **Version Profile Adjustment**: Optimize the display size and internal format of viewing version profile.

## What's Changed
* fix: 支持解析 JSON 格式的 configSyncOtherDirs (#134) by @Robs87 in https://github.com/haierkeys/obsidian-fast-note-sync/pull/137


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/haierkeys/obsidian-fast-note-sync/compare/1.23.5-alpha...1.24.3-alpha

releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能 (New Features)
### ✨ New Features
- **API Token 安全存储机制**：敏感凭据存储到 Obsidian 钥匙串中，并优先调用系统级密钥链进行加解密(如支持)，提升安全性(本次升级后，在开启配置同步的情况下，设备可能会变为未授权状态，重新授权即可恢复正常)。
- **API Token secure storage mechanism**: Sensitive credentials are stored in the Obsidian keychain, and the system-level key chain is first called for encryption and decryption (if supported) to improve security (after this upgrade, when configuration synchronization is turned on, the device may become unauthorized, and re-authorization can return to normal).

### 💄 其他/体验 (Others)
### 💄 Others/Experiences (Others)
- **CI/CD 工作流升级**：更新 GitHub Actions 脚本，迁移至 Node 24 环境，提升构建稳定性。
- **CI/CD workflow upgrade**: Update GitHub Actions scripts, migrate to Node 24 environment, and improve build stability.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/haierkeys/obsidian-fast-note-sync/compare/1.23.4-alpha...1.23.5-alpha

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**1. 核心修复**
**1. Core fix**
- **修复离线同步失效**：改为在 WebSocket 消息发送成功后再更新本地哈希，解决离线期间编辑、重连后不触发同步的 Bug。
- **Fix offline synchronization failure**: Change the local hash to be updated after the WebSocket message is sent successfully to solve the bug of editing during offline and not triggering synchronization after reconnection.
- **修复附件误删（边缘场景）**：解决了在特定同步冲突下导致本地附件被误删的问题（优化了重命名与删除的原子性）。
- **Fixed accidental deletion of attachments (edge ​​scenarios)**: Fixed the issue that caused local attachments to be accidentally deleted under certain synchronization conflicts (optimized the atomicity of renaming and deletion).
- **优化增量同步逻辑**：即使文件时间戳旧（如拷贝进来的），只要是未追踪的新文件也会参与同步。
- **Optimize incremental synchronization logic**: Even if the file timestamp is old (such as copied), new files that are not tracked will participate in the synchronization.
- **解决竞态与内存泄漏**：修复了 `EventManager` 长期运行的内存泄漏，并优化了同步完成判定的状态锁。
- **Resolve race conditions and memory leaks**: Fixed the long-running memory leak of `EventManager`, and optimized the status lock of synchronization completion determination.

**2. 性能与通讯优化**
**2. Performance and communication optimization**
- **哈希计算提速**：改用异步 Web Crypto，解决大仓库初始化时的界面卡顿。
- **Hash calculation speedup**: Switch to asynchronous Web Crypto to solve the interface lag during the initialization of large warehouses.
- **降低延迟**：减小了 WebSocket 缓冲区轮询间隔，提升大批量小文件上传的吞吐率。
- **Reduced Latency**: The WebSocket buffer polling interval is reduced to improve the throughput of uploading large batches of small files.
- **目录优先原则**：强制文件夹结构先于笔记/附件同步，避免父目录不存在导致的写入失败。
- **Directory Priority Principle**: Force the folder structure to be synchronized before notes/attachments to avoid write failures caused by the non-existence of the parent directory.

**3. 其他改进**
**3. Other improvements**
- **日志降噪**：过滤了 `Sync Resource OK` 等冗余成功日志，只保留关键信息。
- **Log Noise Reduction**: Filters redundant success logs such as `Sync Resource OK` and only retains key information.
- **状态补全**：StartupSync 完成后自动补全本地哈希记录，减少下次启动时的冗余校验。
- **Status Completion**: Automatically complete local hash records after StartupSync is completed to reduce redundant verification at the next startup.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/haierkeys/obsidian-fast-note-sync/compare/1.20.3-alpha...1.20.4-alpha

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ---- 1. 插件的核心运行参数已从配置文件迁移到本地存储。现在 FNS 的 `data.json` 可以正常同步。 2. 新增同步日志功能，便于查看每次同步的详细信息和故障原因。 3. 新增“离线删除同步”功能：当文件在同步过程中被删除时，系统会自动同步删除对应项（此项需在设置中开启）。 4. 新增增量同步的自动下载功能：在增量同步时会自动下载缺失的文件，确保本地与远端一致。 5. 增加白名单功能：可为被排除同步的附件、笔记和配置添加白名单豁免。即便开启了“排除同步”，被列入白名单的项目仍会被同步。 6. 调整语言包策略：不再以中文条目作为语言包的索引键，改用更稳定的索引方式以避免歧义和冲突。 ---------- 1. The core running parameters of the plug-in have been migrated from the configuration file to local storage. Now FNS's `data.json` can be synchronized normally. 2. Added a new synchronization log function to facilitate viewing the detailed information and failure reasons of each synchronization. 3. Added "offline deletion synchronization" function: when a file is deleted during the synchronization process, the system will automatically delete the corresponding item simultaneously (this needs to be turned on in the settings). 4. Added automatic download function for incremental synchronization: Missing files will be automatically downloaded during incremental synchronization to ensure consistency between the local and remote locations. 5. Added whitelist function: whitelist exemptions can be added for attachments, notes and configurations that are excluded from synchronization. Even if "Exclude synchronization" is turned on, whitelisted items will still be synchronized. 6. Adjust the language pack strategy: Chinese entries are no longer used as the index key of the language pack, and a more stable indexing method is used to avoid ambiguity and conflicts.
releases.name: 1.10.1-alpha
